'''''Victory 1''''' was an Imperial [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was the vessel responsible for the destruction of the two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigates]] ''[[Cruuz]]'' and [[Fox (frigate)|''Fox'']] in the [[Battle of the Bajic Shipyards]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
